actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Poison damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Fast venomous attacker with extended reach
tactical_info.positioning: Uses 10 ft reach to strike from relative safety
tactical_info.key_abilities: High DEX and long reach make it hard to pin down
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low HP makes it fragile despite high AC
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent hit-and-run fighter, works well with other mobile creatures
